title: Buttery Crispy Chicken Algerian Cumble
description: A sick-day dish featuring shredded chicken with a crispy almond topping and tangy pickled vegetables for an algerian twist.

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: to taste for seasoning chicken and pickling

instructions: Mix almond meal with 1 tablespoon of flour. Set aside.
Season chicken breasts with paprika, garlic powder, and a pinch of salt on both sides.
In a large skillet over medium-high heat, melt butter and cook chicken for about 5 minutes per side until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove chicken from skillet and place in a baking dish. Brush the remaining flour mix onto the top of each piece of chicken to create a crispy crust when baked.
Preheat oven to 400°F. Spread almond meal mixture over chicken, then bake for 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, prepare pickled onions by mixing together white vinegar and table salt in a bowl until fully dissolved. Add cherry tomatoes and yellow onions; cover with plastic wrap or tinfoil and let sit at room temperature for 30 minutes to infuse flavors.
After baking chicken, pour hot pickled onion mixture over top of the warm chicken pieces. Let stand for about 10 minutes before serving.
Serve immediately as a snack or side dish.
